name: Concatenation of Functions
description: Theorem defining the concatenation of two functions at a point and computing its piecewise values.

elements.text: CTN(f, r, g) ∈ FNS(V[0, r) ∪ W', A ∪ B).
CTN(f, r, g)(t) = f(t) if t ∈ V[0, r).
CTN(f, r, g)(t) = g(t - r) if t ∈ IJS[r, ∞) and t - r ∈ W.
